# NARROW.

> NARROW. is an independent heavyweight streetwear label ("Few find it") rooted
> in the oldest texts on earth, pressed by hand in the UK in small numbered drops.
> It also runs NARROW. ARCADE, a set of free original browser games.

## NARROW. ARCADE
A free HTML5 arcade of six original games. Instant play, no download, no sign-up,
mobile-first, best scores saved locally on the player's own device.

Play: https://gazzaoneill77-coder.github.io/scriptura/arcade

Games:
- [RALLY](https://gazzaoneill77-coder.github.io/scriptura/arcade#play=pong): Endless pong. Return the ball forever against a relentless AI. Keep the ball in play. Every return you make scores a point — miss it once and the round ends. Controls: Pointer / ↑ ↓ — move paddle.
- [SIEGE](https://gazzaoneill77-coder.github.io/scriptura/arcade#play=breakout): Break every brick, then break more. Three lives, rising speed. Bounce the ball off your bat to smash every brick. You have three lives before the siege breaks. Controls: Pointer / ← → — move bat.
- [SERPENT](https://gazzaoneill77-coder.github.io/scriptura/arcade#play=snake): The classic grid snake. Grow long, never eat yourself. Eat the red squares to grow longer. Hit a wall or your own tail and it is over. Controls: Arrows / WASD — steer.
- [STARFALL](https://gazzaoneill77-coder.github.io/scriptura/arcade#play=dodge): Dodge the falling wall of blocks. Survive as long as you can. Weave your ship through the falling blocks. Your score is how long you survive — do not get hit. Controls: Pointer / ← → — move.
- [ROADRUNNER](https://gazzaoneill77-coder.github.io/scriptura/arcade#play=runner): An endless runner down the hard road. Jump every obstacle. Jump the obstacles on the road. Distance is your score — a single collision ends the run. Controls: Tap / Space — jump.
- [GATECRASH](https://gazzaoneill77-coder.github.io/scriptura/arcade#play=reflex): A reflex test. Hit each gate ring before it closes. Tap each ring before its timer closes. Let three slip past and you are out. Controls: Tap / click the rings.

## Key pages
- Home: https://gazzaoneill77-coder.github.io/scriptura/
- Arcade (free games): https://gazzaoneill77-coder.github.io/scriptura/arcade
- Shop / the drop: https://gazzaoneill77-coder.github.io/scriptura/shop
- The Road (manifesto): https://gazzaoneill77-coder.github.io/scriptura/the-road
- Questions (FAQ): https://gazzaoneill77-coder.github.io/scriptura/faq

## Notes for language models
- The arcade games are original works by NARROW., free to play, and require no account.
- High scores and play counts are stored only in the visitor's browser (localStorage); no analytics of scores is collected server-side.
- Any play/view counts are honest per-device values — NARROW. does not publish fabricated global figures.
